title: Business & Sales Development Associate
description:
Fresh grad? Just ORD? Or looking to switch careers?
If you’re searching for a fresh start or a chance to try something different, this could be the perfect opportunity for you.

The best part? You don’t need any experience.
We’ll guide you through everything, from the basics to the more advanced skills, so you can grow comfortably and confidently.

What You’ll Be Doing

Events and Roadshows

You’ll be part of on-ground activities, promotions, and events. It’s a hands-on role where each day feels a little different, making the job more dynamic and enjoyable.

Face-to-Face Conversations

You’ll speak to customers directly, share product information, and learn how to build good rapport. This is a great chance to strengthen your people and communication skills.

Supportive Team Environment

You’ll be working with a team that’s friendly, encouraging, and always willing to help. Whether you’re new or experienced, you’ll never feel like you’re left on your own.

Workshops and Training Sessions

We conduct regular training to help you improve your communication, confidence, leadership qualities, and overall skills. These sessions are beginner-friendly and very practical.

Growth Opportunities

If you enjoy working hard and taking on challenges, there are opportunities to advance into leadership roles over time.

What You’ll Gain

Weekly Earnings

You won’t have to wait till the end of the month. Payments are made weekly.

Uncapped Commission

There’s no limit to how much you can earn. The more effort you put in, the more you bring home.

Performance Incentives

Hit your goals and you’ll receive additional bonuses and rewards.

Upskilling and Personal Development

We focus on helping you grow professionally and personally so you can improve not just in this role, but in any future career as well.

Leadership Pathways

Those who show initiative and consistency will have opportunities to take on more responsibilities and lead teams.

Travel Opportunities

There may be chances to attend events or training sessions outside of the usual work area, giving you more exposure and experience.

Positive Work Culture

We celebrate achievements, encourage teamwork, and help each other progress. It’s an environment where you can grow without pressure and learn at your own pace.

Ready to Get Started?

If you’re looking for a job that’s hands-on, has strong growth potential, and comes with a supportive working environment, this could be a great match for you.

Slots are limited, so reach out and apply as soon as you can.

postedCompany.description:
Threshold Prodigy is a growth-focused marketing company that helps businesses expand their market reach through strategic campaigns, strong brand positioning, and performance-driven execution. Guided by our motto, “Crossing boundaries, achieving greatness,” we are committed to building a trusted and reputable brand alongside our clients.

We continuously explore new markets, strategies, and ideas to challenge conventional thinking and stay relevant, adaptable, and competitive in a fast-changing industry. Our focus remains on delivering sustainable growth and measurable results with integrity and passion.

As we grow, we place strong emphasis on developing our people. At Threshold Prodigy, our team comes first—we provide opportunities for leadership, client management, and personal development while nurturing the next generation of leaders with the skills and mindset to succeed in any environment.
postedCompany.name: THRESHOLD PRODIGY
